title: edxeducation Transparent Attribute Blocks | Mini Jar | Set of 60 | Colourful Plastic Shapes | Light Box Accessory | Sensory Play
features: STRENGTHEN ESSENTIAL SKILLS -- Children will develop language skills as they describe the attributes of these shapes in various shapes, sizes and colours.
GREAT FOR GAMES -- Encourage game play by handing students a piece and asking yes/no questions or design as many patterns as possible using only 1 colour.
EXPLORE LIGHT & COLOUR -- Transparent Attribute Blocks are ideal for use on a light panel to investigate shape attributes and mix colours.
CONVENIENTLY PACKAGED -- The transparent shapes are packaged in a storage jar with lid and carry handle. A fun activity to take with you anywhere!
PLAY, LEARN & CREATE -- Our products inspire children to play with purpose. Play is the best teacher! Our high-quality, educational resources fulfil learning needs to 12 years.
description: From the manufacturer Inspire Children to Build Language and Early Maths Skills Take them anywhere These manipulatives are packaged in a sturdy plastic jar for easy cleanup and storage. And the jar features a handle, making it perfect for activities on the go. Investigate colours on a light table! Transparent and colourful, these blocks pop on a light panel and provide a visually stimulating way to learn basic shapes. Play games to learn shapes! Games assist learning and increase the fun factor! Ask children yes/no questions or design patterns using one colour or shape. This set of plastic, Transparent Attribute Blocks includes 60 pieces in 5 shapes, 3 primary colours and 2 sizes: circle, triangle, rectangle, square and hexagon in red, yellow and blue.
